plan_title: Urgent Gantt Tasks Finishing Soon — Email Notifier
plan_description: Reads your Gantt chart Google Sheet and emails you a table of urgent tasks scheduled to finish within the next three full days (excluding today).

data: - Read tasks from the Google Sheet with ID "1RHLbBXzrKv24gNgp7a4Lr7RlMIrP9fjacfGWjhPAbOE".
- Use the sheet tab named "Gantt" as the task source.
- Treat the sheet as one task per row.
- Use column A (header "Tasks") as the task name field.
- Use column F as the task finish (end/due) date field.
- Use column G as the task Priority field.
- Use the timezone associated with your Google account for date comparisons.
actions: - Identify valid task rows by requiring a non-empty task name in column A.
- Parse each task’s finish date from column F into a comparable date value.
- Determine whether a task is urgent by checking column G (Priority).
- Treat a task as urgent if column G (Priority) is exactly "Critical" or exactly "High".
- Compute the date window as: tomorrow through 3 days from now (3 full days excluding today), using your account timezone.
- Keep only tasks that are both (a) urgent and (b) have a finish date within that window.
- Sort the matching tasks by finish date ascending (earliest first).
- If there are no matching tasks, prepare a 'no urgent tasks finishing within the next 3 days (excluding today)' email body.
output: - Generate an email-friendly table for the matching tasks.
- Include these columns in the table: Task (from column A), Finish date (from column F), Priority (from column G).
- Include a link to the source Google Sheet in the email.
delivery: - If there are zero matching tasks, still send an email stating that no urgent tasks are finishing within the next 3 days (excluding today).
processing_steps: - Convert the rows into task objects with fields: task_name, finish_date, priority.
- Compute the date window (tomorrow through 3 days from now) in your account timezone.
- Filter to urgent tasks (Priority = Critical or High) within the window.
- Render the results as an email table and send.
